must_detect.matched_text:
88 Copperfield Road, Perth WA 6000; Southern Quokka Capital Pty Ltd (acquirer) of Level 22, 400 Wombat Street, Sydney NSW 2000; each an Australian proprietary company limited by shares.
Company identifiers: Aurora MinTech Pty Ltd — A B N: 18  102  030  555; A C N: 129  7 7 4  913; Southern Quokka Capital Pty Ltd — ABN 56 211 449 382; ACN 661 203 118 (numbers are fictional).
Primary contact: Ms. Tamsin O’Rourke (CFO, Aurora MinTech) — t.orourke@aurora-mintech.com.au; tel. +61 2 9005 1212; for general enquiries only call 1300 000 777 (public helpline, do not use for deal communications).
Consideration: AUD 84,000,000 payable on Completion; Deposit AUD 4,000,000 to escrow within 5 business days to Platypus Bank Ltd — BSB 123-789, Account 99887766, Ref: SQC-AURORA-2026 (banking details are fictional).
Funding: mixture of senior secured facility and convertible notes; draft ASX announcement (circulated confidentially) contains not generally available information regarding FY26 production guidance and is expected to be MNPI until release.
Conditions precedent: satisfactory confirmatory due diligence; ASIC forms as required (including Form 484/Changes to company details) lodged; no FIRB approval required; employee assignment consents obtained; no employee medical records or health information will be transferred with HR files.
KYC and privacy: each party will provide identity verification, including passport details of key personnel for AML/CTF checks (e.g., Mr. Devan Iqbal — AU passport No. N8792031B); all personal information to be handled in accordance with the Privacy Act 1988 (Cth).
Disclosure and MAC: the parties acknowledge the vendor’s obligations under ASX Listing Rule 3.1; no MAC shall be taken to have occurred by reference to general industry news, analyst reports, or other public-source materials.
Access: data room at https://datavault.quokka.capital/deal?ACN=129%20774%20913&user=t.orourke%40aurora-mintech.com.au; supplementary index available at /files/aurora/SPA-v3.pdf (access restricted).
Identifier notes (precision bait): Invalid ABN (example only, do not use): 00 000 000 000; ACN 111 111 111 (invalid check digit); generic form fields — Name: __________ ; Title: __________.
Employment and credit matters: credit reference checks to be obtained with individual consents; payroll transition plan to exclude TFN storage in shared folders (TFN: 000 000 000 is a placeholder and must not appear in the executed SPA).
Governance: upon Completion the acquirer will appoint one director to the target’s board and the Company Secretary will continue in office; signatories may be the Company Secretary and the CFO.
Other terms: warranties customary for transactions of this nature; any carve-outs for material contracts will be limited to public-domain product documentation (e.g., “quokka core v2” roadmap noted in backlog, non-MNPI project-management prose).
Notices: Southern Quokka Capital Pty Ltd — legal@quokka.capital.au; Aurora MinTech Pty Ltd — contracts@aurora-mintech.com.au; a courtesy helpline at 1300 000 777
